examples: The interest quickly faded, and we rushed to gussy it up with pretty colors and animations.
She is well turned out, while I have been known to use a kitchen sponge to gussy up my pants for work.
But gussy it up a bit, change the name, make it appear more expensive, and maybe it will work better, he said.
He could gussy up the utility for sale, or he could pursue some of the outlandish strategies then in style, such as buying developing-country power plants or investing in unrelated businesses.
